<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after DOWN blocked
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All non-background nodes:")

        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if character moved
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCharacter area (rows 18-35, cols 40-62):")
for i in range(18, 35):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][40:62]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
